steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The student explicitly wants to “emphasize how far the infantrymen traveled.” This goal points directly to a specific detail in the notes: the 1,900-mile distance.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A is the only option that includes the 1,900-mile figure and presents it prominently with an em-dash to stress the distance.

Choices B, C, and D focus on the anniversary year, the journey's original purpose, or a later reenactment—none include the distance information.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
